business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors

coverages_discussed.notes: Prior insurance history for 2024 shows 10 claims and no cancellations.

positives: GPS or ELD devices installed in all vehicles
MVR checks performed on all drivers at least annually
CDL licenses verified for all drivers at time of hire
concerns: CSA BASIC score in Crash Indicator is above intervention threshold (currently being addressed)
Sleeper-cab tractors used for long-haul operations
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history shows 10 claims in 2024, 13 claims in 2023, and 12 claims in 2022. No cancellations in the past 3 years.

fleet_summary.radius_of_operation: Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors / Interstate (FMCSA) / Long-haul

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors. Primary commodities hauled: Dry van: general freight, packaged goods. Flatbed: steel, lumber, machinery.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program is in place. GPS/ELD devices are installed in all vehicles. MVR checks are performed on all drivers at least annually. CDL licenses are verified for all drivers at time of hire.
